title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma with CNF-dual and explicit layer-schedule infrastructure
description:
(v0.8.0) Gate B 32-route stack S2162-S2172 under unchanged t(d,s)=S(d)*(s-1): DNF normalization and normalized-view consumers (S2162-S2163); hypothesis-free recurrence width and frontier/normalized width schedules (S2164-S2166); representative and automatic dedupRepresentativeFrontier layers (S2167-S2169); tight entry-star rebalance 2*(64*m)^k*(32*m*w) (S2170); uniform-32 schedule geometricSchedule32 with product 2*(32*m)^k*(32*m*w) (S2171); multi-round zero-hypothesis all-level packages at ambients 2^16/rounds 2, 2^21/rounds 3, and 2^26/rounds 4 via synthesized dedup (S2172). Audit surface 1704 pinned axiom profiles. Boundary: restricted nonempty-fanin normalized-view route and schedule-entry arithmetic within existing ratio coefficient 32 only; single finite instances; not switching redesign below 32, full B4, PHP switching, Frege/PHP, NP/circuit, arbitrary-class width synthesis, Gate A revival, or P-vs-NP.

Prior releases retain Gate A realized-code/row-collision obstruction and no-go packaging through S2140, Gate B syntactic-terminal class envelopes through S2161, SimpleDNF switching lemma infrastructure, CNF-dual and bounded-depth bridges, PHP depth-floor rungs, and generated/refined iterated-collapse certificates. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20757627.

Non-claims: this artifact does not prove P != NP, P = NP, an NP or circuit lower bound, a Frege/PHP lower bound, arbitrary AC0 or bounded-depth collapse, a PHP switching lemma (Gate A rung 4 remains open), or closure of frozen-form B4.
